title: DependencyResolvedUnitManifest
description: Canonical resolved dependency unit manifest that binds a typed dependency request identity to immutable payload artifacts and verified digest state.

request_hash.description: Canonical digest of the typed dependency request object used for cache-key identity.

resolved_unit_digest.description: Canonical resolved-unit digest over the normalized resolved metadata and payload artifact digests.

dependency_request.description: Authoritative typed dependency request identity this resolved unit satisfies.

payload_artifacts.description: Payload artifact references for this resolved unit.

verification_state.description: Fail-closed integrity state for resolved payload verification.

upstream_manifest_digest.description: Optional upstream package metadata digest bound at fetch time.

upstream_signature_digest.description: Optional upstream signature or attestation digest when present.

derived_only.description: Materialized package-manager stores or unpacked trees are derived-only and never canonical cache identity.

read_only_required.description: Derived materializations must be read-only for workspace consumption.

materialization_profile.description: Optional non-authoritative profile label for derived materialization behavior.

allOf.description: Resolved-unit payload artifacts must stay in dependency-resolved payload data class.

data_class.description: Resolved payload artifacts must use dependency_resolved_payload class.
